figure.title: Error Detected at Switch UPLI Completer
figure.purpose: Shows the system state when an error is detected at the UPLI Completer of a Switch port.

technical_summary: An error is detected within the UPLI Completer of the Switch (on the port facing ACC A).
The entire UPLI Originator and Completer block for that switch port is highlighted with a dashed box.
A loopback symbol (purple arrow) is shown between the Originator and Completer within the Switch, isolating the port from the switch core.

components.name: UPLI Completer (Switch)
components.description: The component where the error is detected on the switch port.

critical_facts: Errors at the UPLI Completer level of a switch port cause the port to enter an isolated loopback state, protecting the switch core.
